meta.title: Luxury Hotels Master - De-duplicated
meta.description: Single consolidated, de-duplicated dataset of prime luxury, palace, wellness and experiential hotels.
meta.location_note: Each hotel has location.lat/lng (curated, approximate) PLUS location.embed_url (drop into an iframe, no API key needed) and location.maps_query/google_maps_url.
meta.image_note: images are placeholders (placehold.co). Site substitutes verified stock photography instead.
